UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user preferences and profile information.

preferredUnits.description: The user's preferred fuel efficiency units.

currency.description: The user's preferred currency (e.g., USD, EUR).

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

FuelLog.title: Fuel Log
FuelLog.description: Represents a single fuel refuel entry.

vehicleId.description: The ID of the vehicle this log belongs to.

mileage.description: The odometer reading at the time of refuel.

liters.description: The amount of fuel in liters.

pricePerLiter.description: The price per liter of fuel.

totalCost.description: The total cost of the refuel.

stationName.description: The name of the gas station.

fuelType.description: The type of fuel (e.g., Regular, Premium).

address.description: The physical address of the gas station.

isHighEfficiency.description: Whether this refuel was highly efficient.

location.description: The geographic location of the gas station.

name.description: The name or nickname of the vehicle.

year.description: The manufacturing year of the vehicle.

plate.description: The license plate of the vehicle.

/users/{userId}/vehicles/{vehicleId}.description: Subcollection of vehicles for a specific user.

/users/{userId}/fuelLogs/{logId}.description: Subcollection of fuel logs for a specific user.
